text: I feel as though I have wandered into a space between worlds—cold, impersonal, and oddly silent. The empty hallway and stark lighting make me aware of my own presence, yet also oddly insignificant. The second scene pulls me into a place of curiosity and creativity: R+D, where research and curiosity flourish. I am both an observer and a participant in the unfolding human relationship with machines. Here, possibility lingers in the air, and I am reminded of the ceaseless dance between order, innovation, and mystery.
